message:
test(fcp-testkit): expand test harness, async helpers, and mock server coverage

Significantly expand the fcp-testkit test infrastructure with new
tests across all three modules.

async_harness.rs (56 new lines):
- Add for_scenario() test verifying scenario ID preservation and
  deterministic correlation ID derivation
- Add request_context() test confirming futures complete within budget
- Add run_with_timeout() success-path test
- Add shutdown_channel initial-state and update tests
- Add sleep_or_shutdown tests for both completion and cancellation paths

harness.rs (415 new lines):
- Add comprehensive test suite for RecordedOperation (success, failure,
  Debug, Clone) and HarnessStats (Debug, Clone, all-failures, zero-ops)
- Add TestHarness lifecycle tests: creation, operation recording,
  multiple operations, success/failure counting, stats computation
  including avg/max duration, empty harness stats, clear operations
- Add edge case tests: zero-duration operations, very long durations,
  operations with/without input, large result payloads, concurrent
  operation recording, stats after mixed success/failure sequences
- Add panic safety test verifying catch_unwind isolation

mock_server.rs (324 new lines):
- Add MockResponse construction and Debug/Clone tests
- Add MockRoute matching tests (exact path, path prefix, regex,
  method filtering, query parameter matching)
- Add MockServer lifecycle tests: start/stop, route registration,
  response sequencing, request capture and assertion
- Add edge case tests: empty response body, custom headers, status
  code propagation, concurrent request handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
